Reduced Inequalities.reason: Core focus on gender inequality, examining discriminatory practices in '政治、經濟、法律、教育等領域' (politics, economy, law, education), directly addressing Targets 10.2 and 10.3.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: Examines how '執政當局' (governing authorities) and '法律' (law) shaped gender roles, linking to Target 16.3 (access to justice) and 16.b (non-discriminatory laws).

Quality Education.reasoning: As a university-level specialized course, it provides tertiary education (Target 4.3) and explicitly trains critical analysis, research, and writing skills (Target 4.7).
